name: HRP Growth Theme
description: Hierarchical Risk Parity (Ward linkage) applied to growth-oriented assets: US equities (VUSA), Nasdaq-100 tech (EQQQ), AI/ML theme (AIGC), India growth (IIND), and MSCI Europe (IMEU). Concentrates on secular growth exposure while using HRP clustering to diversify across geographies and sectors within the growth universe.
